mapper.select: SELECT id, user_name, mobile, nick_name, gender, email, status, dept_id, dept_name, create_time, password FROM sys_user WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user ( user_name, mobile, nick_name, gender, email, status, dept_id, dept_name, password, create_time ) VALUES ( #{userName}, #{mobile}, #{nickName}, #{gender}, #{email}, #{status}, #{deptId}, #{deptName}, #{password}, NOW() )
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM sys_user WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET password = #{newPassword} WHERE id = #{id}
